response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audible vocals phonetically match the provided Reference JSON for both 'Friday Chinatown' and 'Otoko no ko ni naritai'. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized for lyrical content and translations; manual transcription and translation used for on-screen title cards and ad-libs. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are tightly anchored to vocal onset; aggressive truncation and instantaneous transitions applied during the duet to maintain synchronization with the fast-paced choreography and vocals.

subtitles.original: 男のコになりたい
subtitles.english: [Title: I Want To Be A Boy]

subtitles.original: 男のコになりたいのよ 私
subtitles.english: I want to be a boy, me

subtitles.original: 星のハイウェイ バイク飛ばし 見え
subtitles.english: Flying down the highway of stars on a bike, look

subtitles.original: あいつのあとを 透けてゆくのさ
subtitles.english: Transparently following the path of that guy

subtitles.original: そして夢をききたい
subtitles.english: And I want to hear your dreams

subtitles.original: 今日一日だけでいい
subtitles.english: Just for today is enough

subtitles.original: リボンをほどいて 男のコにさせておいて
subtitles.english: Unfasten the ribbon and let me be a boy

subtitles.original: 朝まで一緒だけど
subtitles.english: Together until morning, but...

subtitles.original: Chance いつか Chance 二人 Dance するとき
subtitles.english: Chance, someday chance, when we dance together

subtitles.original: 君は不意に女に戻るの
subtitles.english: You suddenly return to being a woman

subtitles.original: 男のコになりたいような スカート
subtitles.english: Like I want to be a boy, this skirt

subtitles.original: 世界中を自由に旅したい
subtitles.english: I want to travel freely around the world

subtitles.original: バラを一輪 飾るスーツで
subtitles.english: With a suit decorated with a single rose

subtitles.original: 最後の日を決めるの
subtitles.english: Deciding on the final day

subtitles.original: 今日一日だけでいい
subtitles.english: Just for today is enough

subtitles.original: すべてをかなえて 女の子は見せない
subtitles.english: Fulfilling everything, I won't show the girl

subtitles.original: 素顔が見たいの
subtitles.english: I want to see your true face

subtitles.original: Chance いつか Chance 二人 Dance するとき
subtitles.english: Chance, someday chance, when we dance together

subtitles.original: 君はあいつ好みの耳になりそう
subtitles.english: You'll likely become the ears he likes
